Title: Complete Family Legacy Package
Body (HTML): Transferability + Companion + Pre-Paid Transfer Fee — everything you need to pass your LDMA membership on to your family. Your heir receives full membership with no transfer fee.
Description: Transferability + Companion + Pre-Paid Transfer Fee. Everything you need to pass your LDMA membership on to your family.

Title: Add Transferability + Pre-Pay the Transfer Fee
Body (HTML): Transferability plus a pre-paid transfer fee. Designate who receives your membership when the time comes — and your heir gets it with no fee.
Description: Transferability plus pre-paid transfer fee. Your heir receives your membership with no fee.

Title: Add Companion + Pre-Pay the Transfer Fee
Body (HTML): The Companion add-on plus a pre-paid transfer fee. A spouse, child, parent, or grandparent can prospect and camp on their own — and when you transfer your heir receives it with no fee.
Description: Companion add-on plus pre-paid transfer fee. A spouse, child, parent, or grandparent can prospect and camp on their own.

Title: Add the Companion Add-On
Body (HTML): You already have Transferability and the pre-paid transfer fee. Add the Companion add-on — so a spouse, child, parent, or grandparent can prospect and visit camps on their own.
Description: Add the Companion add-on so a spouse, child, parent, or grandparent can prospect and visit camps on their own.

Title: Pre-Pay the Transfer Fee
Body (HTML): You already have Transferability and Companion. Pre-pay the transfer fee so your heir receives your membership with no fee. One less burden for the next generation.
Description: Pre-pay the transfer fee so your heir receives your membership with no fee.
